semantic_range: divine activity or Spirit of God depending on context
cautions: Do not automatically equate every use with the later Christian theological category "Holy Spirit."
Do not jump from the word alone to a complete doctrine of the Spirit.
notes: Starter curated helper entry, not a full lexicon.

semantic_range: wind or breath in some contexts
Spirit of God / Holy Spirit depending on context
cautions: Do not assume every use refers to the Holy Spirit.
Do not mix Hebrew ruach and Greek pneuma without explaining the language/context difference.
notes: Starter curated helper entry, not a full lexicon.

cautions: This is not the normal Hebrew word for wind.
It should not be presented as the primary answer to "spirit or wind."

cautions: This is not the normal Hebrew word for spirit or wind.
